segments.beat: device intro — clear-shell console enters frame from top, PCB and ribbon cable visible through resin
display lights up showing 'SPACE BATTLE / TRENCH RUN' title screen, transparent shell framing active pixels
steady close-up hold — see-through display and internal chip fully readable, colourful background behind device
camera slowly zooms/pans in, PCB fills more frame, game title screen persists
device drifts partially out of frame bottom, last glimpse of lit display and clear shell edge

demonstrates.motion_value: high — chip, ribbon flex, and board traces visible through shell across multiple seconds
high — active pixel game title clearly readable on transparent OLED pane
medium — static title screen, no gameplay motion but clear retro pixel font and game name
low — device visible but no hand or reference object for direct size comparison
medium — resin shell gloss and PCB detail legible at close range

selection_note: Clean transparent-shell + lit-display double-proof in one shot; strong hero loop for the two load-bearing claims, cuts well at 0:00–0:04 before device exits frame.

aesthetics.standout: active display with readable game UI (SPACE BATTLE title)
aesthetics.weakness: busy patchwork background, severe framing drift, heavy crop/roll late
aesthetics.note: prototype-on-a-table grab shot; busy background and unstable framing disqualify without reshoot
